settings.helpText: a short description only used in Future modules in this course
A lead in sentence about the content
Bulleted list of module outcomes to replace ‘Description’. Follows on from ‘On completion of this module you will be able to:’
Bullet points which follow on from the sentence "This module covers:".
Select number of hours to complete the module.
Define module content and order here.
Leave blank if you don’t have to have completed a previous module to start this module.
All page content including sub-headings, bullet points and images.
Use Learning Log to take notes?
Displayed after "That’s right" if the user selects the correct answer.
Displayed after "That’s not quite right" if the user selects the wrong answer.
All page content including sub-headings, bullet points and images.
Unique I18n locale key in the format: "this_foo.that_bar.baz"
Plain text or markdown supported. Styling, variables and pre-built markup are supported.
